name: @storytree/base
description: The universal browser-safe base seam (ADR-0068 step 5): the narrow Store/ChangeStore document-event store contract, the InMemoryStore reference impl, and StoredDoc/StoreEvent/DeleteDocOpts/retiredEventDoc. The reusable node:test parity suites live behind the ./parity subpath so the main entry carries NO node: import — browser-safe. ADR-0017.
